title: FORT KENNEDY - 211info
text: FORT KENNEDY FORT KENNEDY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food boxes, pet food, clothing, showers, blood pressure checks, bus passes, legal information services, and benefit and housing resources. 7600 SE Johnson Creek Boulevard Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Veterans, all discharge types Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm. Various programs may have specific times. Email (503) 765-2661 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 765-2661 Lauren McDonnell [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website calendar for more information. New clients will meet with a case manager for an initial intake discussion to provide an overview of the services. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: VA ID or DD-214 AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 72, stop is 82nd Avenue and Johnson Creek Boulevard Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Blood Pressure Screening * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Bus Fare * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Food Pantries * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues General Clothing Provision * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Housing Search Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Legal Information Services * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Pet Food * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Public Showers/Baths * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: MUTUAL SUPPORT - VETERAN SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FORT KENNEDY
